actionType.title: Action Type
actionType.description: The specific modification to perform. Choose one: 'Cancel' or 'Reschedule'.

appointmentNumber.title: Appointment number
appointmentNumber.description: Human-readable appointment number from the patient confirmation (e.g. SA-0017). Not a Salesforce record Id.

patientLookupEmail.title: Patient lookup email
patientLookupEmail.description: Plain email on file to verify the booking belongs to this patient. Not a Salesforce record Id.

newStartTime.title: New Start Time
newStartTime.description: The date and time requested for the reschedule, formatted as a standard Date/Time string. Leave blank if performing a 'Cancel' action.
